items.name_cn:
M24905 White
Neverfull MM Handbag
This spacious Neverfull MM is part of the Nautical Capsule, featuring colorful Monogram Blossoms. Sixty-six colorful threads, in subtle gradient colors, are interwoven to create a jacquard pattern. Connected to the long shoulder strap is a sculpted mirror charm. It features a matching removable zip pocket inside. Dimensions: 31-28-14 cm.

LOCY BB Series 🅼44141 Uninspected Version #
❐ Size: 20*16*7.5cm ❐
A classic vintage series that is impossible to resist at first glance. This Locy BB is a reimagined version of the classic One Handle. As a perennial bestseller and versatile classic, it remains a "must-have" after the test of time. It maintains high sales volume and excellent resale value. With various carrying styles using the wrist strap or long shoulder strap, it is stylish and unique!
Locky BB suits every mood and occasion. Beautiful and distinctive, it is the magic king that every woman cannot resist!

A fresh take on the EAST WEST spacious layout, ready to ride the next wave of fashion!
onthego features a simple and stylish design suitable for all daily occasions, with enough space for your essentials. The compact body and five-in-one shoulder strap combo definitely makes you look youthful and full of girlish charm!
Not only has the strap been redesigned, but it also comes with a small coin pouch, making the bag shape even more dynamic!
You have to say, the designer really understands women!
